THEWICKEN-LARGE_POCKETS.title: Large Pockets
THEWICKEN-LARGE_POCKETS.flavor: Deep pockets, deeper secrets — always room for one more bottle.
THEWICKEN-TWINROOT.title: Twinroot
THEWICKEN-TWINROOT.description: Whenever you [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card, add a copy of it into your [gold]Deck[/gold].
THEWICKEN-TWINROOT.flavor: Cut one root and two grow back — the hedge-witch's oldest trick.
THEWICKEN-WORMYS_APPLE.title: Wormy's Apple
THEWICKEN-WORMYS_APPLE.description: Upon pickup, gain [green]{MaxHp}[/green] Max HP. At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Wormy[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWICKEN-WORMYS_APPLE.flavor: Sweet to the core — and the core's already taken.
